chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Misc. Applications No.593 to 597 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case 12.11.2024. Applicant is present in person. Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh. Counsel for the applicant is absent as usual. It is 10:15 a.m., the pretext stated by the applicant is that his counsel has gone to offer prayer, which on the face of it is not believable because at this time no prayer is held. I have heard the applicant in person. He has not been able to show any illegality in the impugned order. In the impugned order, he has been directed not to cause any harassment to the respondents and shall not take law on his hands. No exception can be taken against the order passed by the trial Court. These Criminal Misc. Applications are meritless and the same are accordingly dismissed. Office to place a copy of this order in connected Cr. Misc. Applications. JUDGE HANIF
